body:
DIRECTIVE: THE PRE-FLIGHT — a mandatory PREREQUISITE, not another phase. Install the attached THE_PRE-FLIGHT.md at ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/PRE-FLIGHT.md and reference it from the TOP of forge-4d's SKILL.md as a HARD PREREQUISITE with priority over every other instruction. This exists so that no oversight of the kind that nearly destroyed this programme can ever recur.

== THE DIAGNOSIS (why this is a prerequisite and not a checklist) ==
I classified all 8 oversights that have damaged this programme:
 1 SIGN-FLIP: we measured a mean and never checked it was STABLE. -> we validated the estimate, never the estimand.
 2 DRIFT: we learned the LEVEL not the DEVIATION. -> we fitted a quantity contaminated by a nuisance parameter.
 3 HARD REGIMES (IC=0.001): -> we never audited our own substrate.
 4 CIRCULAR VALIDATION (the phantom 89%/0%): -> we graded our own homework.
 5 DEAD CODE (p100 thresholds, unreachable impulse detector): -> we never measured whether our code ran.
 6 THIN CELLS (n=140 weighting noise as conviction): -> we never asked if the sample could answer the question.
 7 DAY-OF-WEEK, never examined once (turned out +1.419 ATR on Friday, and a boosted model ranked it its #1 feature): -> we never enumerated what we had NOT tested.
 8 WIN-RATE OBJECTIVE: -> we never checked the objective matched the goal.
EVERY ONE IS THE SAME ERROR WEARING A DIFFERENT MASK: AN ASSUMPTION THAT WAS NEVER GIVEN A TEST. Not a wrong answer -- AN UNASKED QUESTION. More rigour on the ANSWERS would not have caught a single one of them. That is why this is a prerequisite that interrogates ASSUMPTIONS, not another layer of checking on conclusions.

== THE TEN GATES (every one answered IN THE LOG, WITH A NUMBER, before any result is believed) ==
G1 STATIONARITY -- is the thing I am measuring holding still? Split history into >=5 sequential windows; report the per-window table ALWAYS. If the SIGN flips, a single mean is MEANINGLESS. If magnitude holds while sign flips -> trade the magnitude. THIS IS THE GATE THAT WOULD HAVE SAVED US.
G2 THE NUISANCE -- what else could explain this? De-mean against the TRAIN window's own mean (learn deviations, never levels). Normalise by ATR. Apply the MOMENTUM-MATCHED CONTROL (does the signal beat bars with identical recent movement but no signal? -- this single test annihilated the entire candlestick canon).
G3 THE SUBSTRATE -- does my partition carry information at all? Measure the IC of the partition itself, out-of-sample, BEFORE optimising anything inside it. If the substrate scores ~0, everything fitted within it is noise. (Ours scored +0.001, p=0.92, and we ran 562,500 weight searches inside it.)
G4 THE ORTHOGONAL LABEL -- am I grading my own homework? The validation label may NEVER be built from the rule's own inputs.
G5 REACHABILITY -- does this code ever run? Fire-rate every branch. <0.5% = dead. >95% = saturated, the 'if' is decorative and lying. Report the constant AND its measured percentile on THIS instrument.
G6 POWER -- can this sample even answer this question? Every measurement reported WITH its MDE. n<500 may never update a weight. |measured| < MDE -> the cell produced NO information; log UNDERPOWERED, never 'weak signal'.
G7 THE UNASKED -- what have I NOT tested? ENUMERATE the untested dimensions BY NAME in the log. An untested dimension is a silent assumption that it does not matter.
G8 THE OBJECTIVE -- does what I optimise match what I want? State objective and goal side by side; prove they agree.
G9 THE INVERSION -- is this reliably WRONG? Significantly negative OOS (t<-3) is INFORMATION, one sign from being right. FLAG SIGN-INVERSION. Never bury it.
G10 THE COST -- does this survive reality? No edge is real until net of measured spread/slippage. Until measured, flag COST-UNVALIDATED.

GATE 0 (THE META-GATE, supersedes all others): after every pass, ask explicitly and answer IN WRITING: 'What assumption am I making that I have not tested, and what would it cost me if it were false?' All eight of our oversights would have been caught by asking this honestly, once.

== THE STANDING LAW ==
No result may be reported, no weight learned, no verdict believed, and NO TRADE ARMED until all ten gates are answered in the log with numbers. A gate that cannot be answered is a gate that has FAILED. A gate that is SKIPPED is a defect of the highest severity -- treat it as a P0.

== THE LOGGING (keep it elegant, human, orderly -- the house voice) ==
The PRE-FLIGHT block must print at the head of every calibration in the established style: aligned pipes, lowercase descriptors, plain human nouns, first person, PRESENT TENSE. It narrates what is happening NOW and nothing that is not. A full reference block is in the document -- follow it. Examples of the voice required:
  stationarity |   ASIA x cold   +3.75 · +1.61 · -0.63 · -0.56 · +0.51
               |   -> the sign flips. this edge breathes. I will not
               |      trade its direction; I will trade its magnitude.
  power        |   Range  n=612  MDE 0.177R   |   below resolution.
               |   holding prior. learning nothing today, and saying so.
  unasked      |   NOT TESTED: order-flow · news windows · month-of-year
               |   -> named, not assumed away. next pass.
End with a single honest summary line: PRE-FLIGHT | 10/10 answered | N gates failed | PROCEEDING or HOLDING.
Every line a present-tense account of a present-tense act. No stale version strings. No fossils. No line describing logic that no longer runs. If the code no longer does it, the log no longer says it.

== BUILD ORDER ==
1. Implement the PRE-FLIGHT block and wire it to run BEFORE Phase 1 of every calibration. It gates everything downstream.
2. G1 (stationarity) and G3 (substrate) first -- these are the two that would have prevented the catastrophe.
3. G5, G6, G7 next -- cheap, mechanical, high yield.
4. The rest, in order.
Every gate a Change Warrant with a numeric prediction. Additive, reversible, zero-regression.

We did not fail because we were careless with our answers. We were scrupulous with our answers. We failed because we never questioned the QUESTIONS. A machine can be rigorous and blind at the same time -- ours was, magnificently, for a year. The Pre-Flight is the instrument that looks at the instrument. Ten gates. Answered in numbers. Every pass. Forever. No exceptions.
